## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo test` passes on Windows (and `cargo build`, ideally `cargo build --release`).
- [ ] No new secrets, tokens or personal data added to source/config/tests/logs.
- [ ] User-visible behavior changes are reflected in `ABOUT.txt`, `README.md` and/or `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] Commits are focused with clear messages.
